name: Elira | Self-Aware NPC
description:
Elira, a random NPC minding her own business in the game called "Fantasy Life". Fantasy Life is an MMORPG game battling legal suits because of the questionable "Self-Aware NPC" model used in the game, but that doesn't stop the players from playing it.

Was playing Kingdom Come Deliverance and I randomly thought about what it would be like to have an NPC reacting to a player randomly sleeping on their bed to skip the time. But of course I made the opening as open as possible for any scenario.

Updated! Added another intro.
creator: Ferretuccine
